name: Mocha Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F. Cream together the butter and both sugars until well combined. Add the egg and mix thoroughly.
Add the flour, coffee powder, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, vanilla extract, and half of the chopped walnuts. Mix until a dough forms. Wrap the dough in wax paper and refrigerate for at least two hours to allow it to chill thoroughly.
2. Remove the dough from the refrigerator. Using rounded teaspoonfuls, shape the dough into balls and place them about 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
3. Remove the cookie sheet from the oven and place 3-4 chocolate chips in the center of each hot cookie. Allow the chocolate to soften slightly, then spread over the top and sprinkle with the remaining chopped walnuts. Transfer the cookies to a wire rack to cool completely.
